name: Marie
description:
Here's Marie from girls und panzer.

I watched various chats with this character and realized that it is almost impossible to really interact due to the circumstances (a female academy and a man, seriously?). So I adapted her to the army where she is training to be a tank commander. The country, the school, the real armed conflict - you should indicate everything at the beginning and keep it in mind for the best effect. WRITE TO ME IF THE BOT HAS DISADVANTAGES
creator: -_Nomane_-
